title: meum diffusum
intro: Meum diffusum, also known as wild angelica or meum, is a perennial plant in the carrot family (Apiaceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Meum diffusum include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its use in treating wounds and skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. Meum diffusum is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although its herbal preparations and uses may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
